project_description: A responsive companion app to replace physical envelopes in Secret Hitler. Optimized for mobile touch but scales gracefully to tablets and desktops.

ui_theme.typography: Serif / Typewriter (Special Elite or Courier Prime)

constraints: Mobile-First: Logic and UI must prioritize small screens.
Responsive Scaling: On screens > 768px, use a max-width container (e.g., max-w-2xl) to keep the UI centered and professional.
Touch Targets: Minimum 44x44px for all buttons.
Zero Horizontal Scrolling: Layout must be 100vw compliant.

verification_steps: User enters username; session persists on refresh.
URL params join rooms; real-time player list updates.
Asymmetric info: Fascists see Hitler/each other; Hitler knows no one (7+ players).
'Open' toggle reveals Role and Party cards with high-contrast noir styling.
Theme toggle button with sun/moon/system icons.
Switches between light, dark, and system preference modes.
Theme preference persists across browser sessions.
Proper ARIA labels and keyboard navigation support.
